case_title: TADASHI MAKI VS. SEBO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAKI, TADASHI AS TO DEFENDANT SEBO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP BLACK, MICHAEL E. , EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF SEBO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP DUNHAM, DANIEL B. , EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF SEBO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAKI, TADASHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEBO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP BLACK, MICHAEL E. , EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF SEBO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP DUNHAM, DANIEL B. , EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF SEBO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $32,514.73 PRINCIPAL, $454.72 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $33,419.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
